projects.name: Predicting Students Career Aspirations Using Machine Learning
projects.description: Engineered ML models on academic and personal datasets, employing feature engineering and EDA, optimized Random Forest achieving 80% accuracy with integrated career recommendation system.

projects.name: Customer Segmentation with K-Means Clustering
projects.description: Executed clustering on behavioral and demographic data, leveraging EDA and cluster validation (Elbow, Silhouette) to derive actionable marketing insights.

projects.name: Web Scraping & Data Extraction - Borjan E-commerce
projects.description: Implemented automated Python scraper with BeautifulSoup and Requests to extract structured product datasets, streamlining data pipelines for downstream analysis.
